Title: Lester, C. Edwards
Overview: Author of early American biography of artists. His book Artists of America, featured biographies of Washington Allston, Henry Inman, Benjamin West, Gilbert Charles Stuart, John Trumbull, James DeVeaux, Rembrandt Peale, Thomas Crawford. His work built on the early criticism of John Neal.
Selected Bibliography: The Artists of America: a Series of Biographical Sketches of American Artists: with Portraits and Designs on Steel. New York: Baker & Scribner, 1846.
Sources: Sears, Donald A. John Neal. Boston: Twayne Publishers, 1978, p. 116, mentioned.
